data.content: Plan prepared for `foolery-4973`: expose Knots lease-agent metadata in beat data, refactor the Active screen to source Agent/Model/Version from lease metadata instead of handoff capsules or terminal display labels, and add mapper plus active-view coverage for Claude, Codex, and OpenCode cases. No child knots proposed. Dependency noted: `foolery-0768` is defining the canonical lease identity contract this UI change should consume.
